case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER VS. MOHAMMAD WAQAR

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT WAQAR, MOHAMMAD DBA TAJ MAHAL PAKISTANI & INDIAN RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAQAR, MOHAMMAD DBA TAJ MAHAL PAKISTANI & INDIAN RESTAURANT $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
